SCADA Standards Volume 1 of 3 
Responsibilities Matrix 
The policies and procedures contained in this manual must be periodically reviewed and 
updated to ensure accuracy based on changes to the City’s systems and for changes to 
technology. This section describes the roles and responsibilities for maintenance and 
update of these policies.
